PreToolUse.description: [STACK] Context7: Auto-fetch docs before using any framework/library

hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: Use Context7 MCP to fetch latest docs before implementing'

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ext="${filepath##*.}"; case "$ext" in ts|tsx|js|jsx) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null | head -20 ;; py) ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; pyright "$filepath" 2>/dev/null | head -20 ;; swift) swift format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; go) gofmt -w "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; dart) dart format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; echo 'Quality check complete'

PostToolUse.description: [STACK] TDD reminder: Check if test exists for edited file

hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -qvE '(\.test\.|_test\.|spec\.|__tests__|test_)'; then dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); base=$(basename "$filepath" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); found=0; for pattern in "${dir}/${base}.test.*" "${dir}/${base}_test.*" "${dir}/${base}.spec.*" "${dir}/__tests__/${base}.*"; do ls $pattern 2>/dev/null && found=1; done; if [ $found -eq 0 ]; then echo "WARNING: No test file found for $filepath. TDD requires tests first!"; fi; fi

PreCompact.description: [STACK] Save full project state before context compaction

hooks.command: echo '=== STACK CONTEXT SNAPSHOT ==='; echo ''; echo '## Project State (GSD)'; cat .planning/STATE.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No GSD state'; echo ''; echo '## Current Roadmap'; cat .planning/ROADMAP.md 2>/dev/null | head -40 || echo 'No roadmap'; echo ''; echo '## Active Requirements'; cat .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo 'No requirements'; echo ''; echo '## Recent Decisions (Compound)'; for f in $(ls -t docs/brainstorms/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -3); do echo "--- $f ---"; head -10 "$f"; done; echo ''; echo '## Recent Plans'; for f in $(ls -t docs/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -3); do echo "--- $f ---"; head -10 "$f"; done; echo ''; echo '## Recent Solutions (Learnings)'; for f in $(ls -t docs/solutions/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -3); do echo "--- $f ---"; head -10 "$f"; done; echo ''; echo '## Git Recent'; git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null || echo 'No git'; echo ''; echo '## Modified Files'; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'Clean'; echo ''; echo '## CLAUDE.md Summary'; head -30 CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No CLAUDE.md'; echo ''; echo '=== END SNAPSHOT ==='
echo 'Reminder: Run /ce:compound to save learnings. Session state is auto-preserved in .planning/ and docs/'

SessionStart.description: [STACK] Load project context at session start

hooks.command: if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then echo '=== RESUMING PROJECT ==='; echo 'State:'; head -15 .planning/STATE.md; echo '---'; echo 'Recent git:'; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; echo '=== Read CLAUDE.md and .planning/ for full context ==='; fi
